caption: In a studio setting filled with framed photographs and clothing on racks, a man wears a tall, silver, spiked wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears black headphones and sits before a black microphone. On-screen text and logos feature the words "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man is seen speaking and gesturing with his hands while looking toward someone off-camera. In the second frame, his head turns slightly to the right. By the third frame, a person's arm and shoulder are partially visible on the left edge of the screen, and another person's head is visible in the background. In the final frame, the man faces forward again, maintaining his posture and expression as he continues to engage in the conversation.
